verses.latin_vulgate: Alleluja.   Laudate Dominum in sanctis ejus ;  laudate eum in firmamento virtutis ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֥לְלוּ־יָ֨הּ ׀ הַֽלְלוּ־אֵ֥ל בְּקׇדְשׁ֑וֹ הַֽ֝לְל֗וּהוּ בִּרְקִ֥יעַ עֻזּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Praise ye the Lord in his holy places: praise ye him in the firmament of his power.
verses.finnish_biblia: Halleluja! Kiittäkäät Herraa hänen pyhässänsä: kiittäkäät häntä hänen väkevyytensä avaruudessa!
verses.king_james: Praise ye the Lord. Praise God in his sanctuary: praise him in the firmament of his power.

verses.latin_vulgate: Laudate eum in virtutibus ejus ;  laudate eum secundum multitudinem magnitudinis ejus.
verses.douay_rheims: Praise ye him for his mighty acts: praise ye him according to the multitude of his greatness.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kiittäkäät häntä hänen voimallisten tekoinsa tähden: kiittäkäät häntä ylenpalttisen suuruutensa tähden!
verses.king_james: Praise him for his mighty acts: praise him according to his excellent greatness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Laudate eum in sono tubæ ;  laudate eum in psalterio et cithara.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֭לְלוּהוּ בְּתֵ֣קַע שׁוֹפָ֑ר הַ֝לְל֗וּהוּ בְּנֵ֣בֶל וְכִנּֽוֹר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Praise him with the sound of trumpet: praise him with psaltery and harp.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kiittäkäät häntä basunilla: kiittäkäät häntä psaltareilla ja kanteleilla!
verses.king_james: Praise him with the sound of the trumpet: praise him with the psaltery and harp.

verses.latin_vulgate: Laudate eum in tympano et choro ;  laudate eum in chordis et organo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֭לְלוּהוּ בְּתֹ֣ף וּמָח֑וֹל הַֽ֝לְל֗וּהוּ בְּמִנִּ֥ים וְעֻגָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: Praise him with timbrel and choir: praise him with strings and organs.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kiittäkäät häntä harpuilla ja tanssilla: kiittäkäät häntä harpun kielillä ja huiluilla!
verses.king_james: Praise him with the timbrel and dance: praise him with stringed instruments and organs.

verses.latin_vulgate: Laudate eum in cymbalis benesonantibus ;  laudate eum in cymbalis jubilationis.
verses.douay_rheims: Praise him on high sounding cymbals: praise him on cymbals of joy: let every spirit praise the Lord. Alleluia.
verses.king_james: Praise him upon the loud cymbals: praise him upon the high sounding cymbals.

verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikki, joilla henki on, kiittäkään Herraa, Halleluja!
verses.king_james: Let every thing that hath breath praise the Lord. Praise ye the Lord.
